channel.title: healthy-light-meals Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh healthy-light-meals posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Creamy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie for Busy Mornings
item.description: This smoothie combines rich chocolate and peanut butter flavors with protein to keep you energized and full. It’s naturally creamy with no added sugar, making it a perfect quick breakfast or post-workout pick-me-up.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 1

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk, cold
  • 1 medium frozen banana
  • 2 tablespoons natural peanut butter
  • 1 scoop chocolate protein powder
  • 1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa powder
  • 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract
  • Ice cubes (optional, to thicken)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #unsweetened #medium #natural

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Chocolate Peanut Butter Protein Smoothie for Busy Mornings
media:content.media:description: This smoothie combines rich chocolate and peanut butter flavors with protein to keep you energized and full. It’s naturally creamy with no added sugar, making it a perfect quick breakfast or post-workout pick-me-up.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, unsweetened, medium, natural

item.title: Tropical Mango Smoothie Bowl with Coconut & Kiwi - Fresh Morning Boost
item.description: This tropical mango smoothie bowl is a fresh, vibrant way to start your day. The creamy mango base pairs perfectly with crunchy coconut flakes and tangy kiwi slices. Great for a quick breakfast or light snack!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mango chunks
  • 1/2 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • 1/2 cup coconut milk, chilled
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1 kiwi, peeled and sliced
  • 2 tablespoons unsweetened shredded coconut
  • 1 tablespoon chia seeds (optional)
  • Fresh mint leaves for garnish (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #coconut

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Tropical Mango Smoothie Bowl with Coconut & Kiwi - Fresh Morning Boost
media:content.media:description: This tropical mango smoothie bowl is a fresh, vibrant way to start your day. The creamy mango base pairs perfectly with crunchy coconut flakes and tangy kiwi slices. Great for a quick breakfast or light snack!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, coconut

item.title: Bright and Creamy Tropical Mango Pineapple Smoothie Bowl
item.description: This smoothie bowl is a tropical escape in a bowl with mango and pineapple blending into creamy goodness. I toss in coconut flakes for texture and a fresh vibe. Ideal for a sunny breakfast or a light afternoon pick-me-up!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup frozen mango chunks
  • 1 cup frozen pineapple chunks
  • 1/2 cup Greek yogurt, plain and cold
  • 1/4 cup coconut milk
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 2 tablespoons unsweetened coconut flakes
  • Fresh fruit slices and chia seeds for topping (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #frozen #greek

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Bright and Creamy Tropical Mango Pineapple Smoothie Bowl
media:content.media:description: This smoothie bowl is a tropical escape in a bowl with mango and pineapple blending into creamy goodness. I toss in coconut flakes for texture and a fresh vibe. Ideal for a sunny breakfast or a light afternoon pick-me-up!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, frozen, greek

item.title: Green Power Smoothie with Spinach and Chia Seeds for Natural Energy Boost
item.description: This smoothie is my go-to for a clean, protein-packed start with no added sugar. The fresh spinach and chia seeds give it a creamy texture and lasting energy. Perfect for mornings or after a workout!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh spinach leaves, washed
  • 1 ripe banana, peeled
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 2 tablespoons chia seeds
  • 1 scoop vanilla protein powder (optional)
  • 1/2 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1/2 teaspoon pure vanilla extract
  • Ice cubes (optional, to taste)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #banana #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Green Power Smoothie with Spinach and Chia Seeds for Natural Energy Boost
media:content.media:description: This smoothie is my go-to for a clean, protein-packed start with no added sugar. The fresh spinach and chia seeds give it a creamy texture and lasting energy. Perfect for mornings or after a workout!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, fresh, banana, unsweetened

item.title: Protein-Packed Chicken Meal Prep Bowls with Fresh Veggies and Tangy Marinade
item.description: These chicken meal prep bowls are a lifesaver for busy days—lean chicken, crisp veggies, and a tangy marinade that really wakes up the flavors. Perfect for a healthy lunch or dinner any day of the week!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 lbs boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • 2 cups cooked quinoa or brown rice
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1 cup steamed broccoli florets
  • 1/2 cup shredded carrots
  • Fresh parsley for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #olive #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Protein-Packed Chicken Meal Prep Bowls with Fresh Veggies and Tangy Marinade
media:content.media:description: These chicken meal prep bowls are a lifesaver for busy days—lean chicken, crisp veggies, and a tangy marinade that really wakes up the flavors. Perfect for a healthy lunch or dinner any day of the week!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, olive, cloves

item.title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry with Fresh Veggies and Juicy Marinade
item.description: This stir fry is my go-to for busy nights—light, packed with protein, and loaded with fresh veggies. The secret? A quick marinade that keeps the chicken juicy without extra calories. Perfect for a healthy dinner that’s ready in no time!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, thinly sliced
  • 2 tbsp soy sauce
  • 1 tbsp rice vinegar
  • 1 tsp sesame oil
  • 1 tbsp honey
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tbsp fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 red bell pepper, sliced
  • 1 cup broccoli florets
  • 1 carrot, julienned
  • 1 small onion, sliced
  • 2 tbsp vegetable oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Optional: sesame seeds and sliced green onions for garnish

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #sauce #vinegar

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Easy 30-Minute Chicken Stir Fry with Fresh Veggies and Juicy Marinade
media:content.media:description: This stir fry is my go-to for busy nights—light, packed with protein, and loaded with fresh veggies. The secret? A quick marinade that keeps the chicken juicy without extra calories. Perfect for a healthy dinner that’s ready in no time!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, boneless, sauce, vinegar

item.title: Fresh Spinach Lemon Ginger Smoothie for a Bright Morning Boost
item.description: This smoothie is a refreshing blend of fresh spinach, zesty lemon, and a touch of ginger that wakes you up naturally. It's perfect for starting your day or as a post-workout refresher when you need a light, energizing drink.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 cups fresh spinach leaves, washed
  • 1 medium lemon, juiced
  • 1 teaspoon fresh ginger, grated
  • 1 medium banana, peeled
  • 1 cup cold water or coconut water
  • 1 tablespoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • Ice cubes (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Creamy Greek Yogurt Chicken Dinner Ready in Just 30 Minutes
item.description: This creamy chicken dinner uses Greek yogurt to keep it light yet satisfying. It’s a quick 30-minute meal that’s perfect for busy weeknights when you want comfort without the heaviness. Super easy and tasty!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb boneless skinless chicken breasts, cut into bite-sized pieces
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 1 cup plain Greek yogurt
  • 1/2 cup low-sodium chicken broth
  • 1 teaspoon smoked paprika
  • 1/2 teaspoon dried thyme
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Fresh parsley, chopped (for garnish)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #boneless #tablespoon #cloves

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This creamy chicken dinner uses Greek yogurt to keep it light yet satisfying. It’s a quick 30-minute meal that’s perfect for busy weeknights when you want comfort without the heaviness. Super easy and tasty!

item.title: Herb-Marinated Garlic Chicken for a Light, Flavorful Dinner
item.description: This chicken dinner is all about fresh herbs and garlic, giving you big flavor without heaviness. The secret? A simple marinade that keeps the meat juicy and tender. Perfect for a quick, guilt-free weeknight meal!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

item.title: Sheet Pan Lamb with Roasted Artichokes: A Mediterranean Delight
item.description: This sheet pan lamb dinner is packed with Mediterranean flavors and super easy to make. The roasted artichokes bring a tender, earthy touch that pairs perfectly with juicy lamb. Ideal for a healthy weeknight meal when you want something quick but satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1.5 pounds lamb shoulder, trimmed and cut into chunks
  • 3 medium artichokes, trimmed and quartered
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil
  • 4 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh rosemary, chopped
  • 1 teaspoon dried oregano
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • Optional: 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #shoulder #medium #olive

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Sheet Pan Lamb with Roasted Artichokes: A Mediterranean Delight
media:content.media:description: This sheet pan lamb dinner is packed with Mediterranean flavors and super easy to make. The roasted artichokes bring a tender, earthy touch that pairs perfectly with juicy lamb. Ideal for a healthy weeknight meal when you want something quick but satisfying.

item.title: Fresh Strawberry Spinach Salad with Zesty Lemon Dressing for Quick Lunches
item.description: This strawberry spinach salad is a bright, fresh mix perfect for a light lunch or side. The lemon dressing adds a zing that balances the sweet berries beautifully. Ready in 20 minutes, it’s a fresh pick-me-up any day!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 6 cups fresh baby spinach, washed and dried
  • 1 1/2 cups fresh strawberries, hulled and sliced
  • 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese
  • 1/4 cup sliced almonds, toasted
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 tablespoon honey
  • 1 teaspoon Dijon mustard
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #crumbled

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This strawberry spinach salad is a bright, fresh mix perfect for a light lunch or side. The lemon dressing adds a zing that balances the sweet berries beautifully. Ready in 20 minutes, it’s a fresh pick-me-up any day!

item.title: Quick Lemon Asparagus and Spinach Salad with Feta That Brightens Any Meal
item.description: This fresh salad combines tender asparagus and spinach with tangy lemon and creamy feta. It’s a speedy, healthy side that livens up lunch or dinner. I love the zing the lemon adds—it’s perfect for spring and summer meals!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 bunch asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 4 cups fresh baby spinach
  • 1/2 cup crumbled feta cheese
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #bunch #fresh #crumbled

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick Lemon Asparagus and Spinach Salad with Feta That Brightens Any Meal
media:content.media:description: This fresh salad combines tender asparagus and spinach with tangy lemon and creamy feta. It’s a speedy, healthy side that livens up lunch or dinner. I love the zing the lemon adds—it’s perfect for spring and summer meals!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230636499, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, bunch, fresh, crumbled

item.title: Light Artichoke and Lemon Quinoa Bowl for Spring: Fresh and Bright Flavors
item.description: This light quinoa bowl combines tangy lemon and tender artichokes for a refreshing spring meal. It’s bright, easy to make, and perfect for lunch or a light dinner when you want something fresh and satisfying.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 2 cups water or vegetable broth
  • 1 cup marinated artichoke hearts, chopped
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and black pepper to taste
  • Optional: 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts or slivered almonds

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #quinoa #water #marinated

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

item.title: Healthy Pea and Radish Spring Soup in 20 Minutes
item.description: This bright, fresh soup combines sweet peas and crisp radishes for a light, healthy meal you can whip up in just 20 minutes. The secret? A quick sauté and blending that keeps all the spring flavors vibrant. Perfect for a light lunch or starter on a sunny day.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 1 cup radishes, sliced thin
  • 4 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #olive #small #cloves

item.title: Roasted Asparagus with Parmesan and Lemon Zest That Steals the Show
item.description: This roasted asparagus side is a breeze to make and full of bright, nutty flavors thanks to Parmesan and fresh lemon zest. It crisps up perfectly in the oven, making it a go-to for quick dinners or festive meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 12 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 pound fresh asparagus, trimmed
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 1/4 cup freshly grated Parmesan cheese
  • 1 teaspoon lemon zest (from about 1 lemon)
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

item.title: Quick Garlic Lemon Asparagus Stir-Fry for Fresh Spring Meals
item.description: This bright asparagus stir-fry is a simple, healthy side bursting with fresh garlic and zesty lemon. Ready in just 15 minutes, it’s perfect when you want something light and vibrant for dinner.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 5 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 lb fresh asparagus, trimmed and cut into 2-inch pieces
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • 3 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 lemon, zested and juiced
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 teaspoon red pepper flakes (optional)

item.title: Zesty Lemon Herb Grilled Salmon for a Fresh, Healthy Dinner
item.description: This grilled salmon is bursting with fresh lemon and herb flavors, making it a healthy and satisfying dinner any night. The bright marinade keeps it tender and juicy—perfect for a quick meal that feels special.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 15 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 ounces each
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Juice and zest of 1 lemon
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #olive #juice

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

media:content.media:description: This grilled salmon is bursting with fresh lemon and herb flavors, making it a healthy and satisfying dinner any night. The bright marinade keeps it tender and juicy—perfect for a quick meal that feels special.

item.title: Creamy Avocado Kale Green Smoothie for a Refreshing Detox Boost
item.description: This green smoothie blends creamy avocado with nutrient-rich kale for a smooth, refreshing detox. It’s super quick to make and perfect for mornings or after a workout when you need a natural boost.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 2

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 ripe avocado, peeled and pitted
  • 2 cups fresh kale leaves, stems removed
  • 1 cup unsweetened almond milk
  • 1 medium banana, peeled
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup (optional)
  • 1/2 cup ice cubes

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #avocado #fresh #unsweetened

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:description: This green smoothie blends creamy avocado with nutrient-rich kale for a smooth, refreshing detox. It’s super quick to make and perfect for mornings or after a workout when you need a natural boost.

item.title: Refreshing Spring Quinoa Salad with Zesty Lemon Dressing
item.description: This quinoa salad is packed with fresh spring veggies and a bright lemon dressing. Toasting the quinoa first adds a lovely nutty flavor. Great for a light lunch or as a fresh side on warm days!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 cup quinoa, rinsed and drained
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil
  • 1 cup cucumber, diced
  • 1 cup cherry tomatoes, halved
  • 1/2 cup radishes, thinly sliced
  • 1/4 cup red onion, finely chopped
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • Juice of 1 lemon
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #quinoa #tablespoon #cucumber

media:content.media:title: Refreshing Spring Quinoa Salad with Zesty Lemon Dressing
media:content.media:description: This quinoa salad is packed with fresh spring veggies and a bright lemon dressing. Toasting the quinoa first adds a lovely nutty flavor. Great for a light lunch or as a fresh side on warm days!

item.title: Bright and Fresh Pea and Mint Soup Ready in 30 Minutes
item.description: This pea and mint soup is super fresh and light, with a lovely zing from the mint. It’s quick to whip up and perfect for a breezy spring lunch or starter. Trust me, the mint really lifts the flavors!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 10 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 20 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 1 tablespoon olive oil, extra virgin
  • 1 small onion, finely chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 4 cups fresh or frozen peas
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/4 cup fresh mint leaves, packed
  • Salt and pepper, to taste
  • Juice of 1/2 lemon
  • Optional: 1/4 cup cream or coconut milk

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #tablespoon #small #cloves

item.title: Silky Spring Pea Soup with Fresh Mint for a Light, Bright Lunch
item.description: This spring pea soup is smooth and bright with a hint of mint, bringing fresh flavors to your table. It’s quick to make and perfect when you want a light, comforting starter or lunch that feels like a spring day in a bowl.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 cups fresh or frozen spring peas
  • 1 small onion, chopped
  • 2 cloves garlic, minced
  • 3 cups vegetable broth
  • 1/2 cup fresh mint leaves, loosely packed
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream or coconut cream
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and pepper to taste
  • Juice of half a lemon

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #fresh #small #cloves

item.title: Fresh Zucchini Noodle Salad with Bright Lemon Dressing Perfect for Quick Lunches
item.description: This zucchini noodle salad is crisp and refreshing with a zingy lemon dressing that wakes up your taste buds. It’s light, easy to whip up, and perfect when you want something healthy but satisfying for lunch or a side dish.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 0 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 medium zucchinis, spiralized into noodles
  • 1/4 cup fresh lemon juice (about 2 lemons)
  • 2 tablespoons extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 teaspoon honey or maple syrup
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1/4 cup chopped fresh basil or parsley
  • 1/4 cup shaved Parmesan cheese (optional)
  • 1/4 cup toasted pine nuts or walnuts (optional)

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230636499 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #medium #fresh #extra

item.title: Herb-Marinated Grilled Salmon Ready in 30 Minutes for a Healthy Dinner
item.description: This grilled salmon is fresh and flavorful, thanks to a vibrant herb marinade that takes just minutes to prepare. It’s a healthy, quick dinner idea perfect for busy weeknights or light weekend meals.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin-on, about 6 ounces each
  • 3 tablespoons olive oil, extra virgin
  • 2 tablespoons fresh lemon juice
  • 2 garlic cloves, minced
  • 1 tablespoon fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh parsley, chopped
  • 1 tablespoon fresh chives, chopped
  • 1 teaspoon honey
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions
